a: Game Booster—Speed Up and Livestream Games
Game Booster | Play Games Faster & Smoother

c.d: The design and usability of the app's interface, including ease of navigation and visual appeal.
The app's ability to enhance device performance during gaming, such as boosting RAM and CPU.
Features related to organizing and managing game libraries within the app.
The ability to live-stream gameplay to platforms like YouTube or Twitch.
The extent to which users can customize the app's appearance and functionality.
Availability of cloud gaming services, allowing users to play games without local installations.
Compatibility with external gaming controllers for enhanced gameplay.
The presence and intrusiveness of advertisements within the app.
The operating systems on which the app is available (e.g., Android, iOS).
The pricing model of the app, including free, freemium, or paid options.
